initial_candidates.sql:
WITH recipe_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 1, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 3, 1) AS INTEGER)
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 3 AND SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 2, 1) = ','
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 5, 1) AS INTEGER)
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 5 AND SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 4, 1) = ','
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 7, 1) AS INTEGER)
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 7 AND SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 6, 1) = ','
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 9, 1) AS INTEGER)
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 9 AND SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 8, 1) = ','
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 11, 1) AS INTEGER)
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 11 AND SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 10, 1) = ','
),
standard_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        rtt.pizza_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM recipe_toppings rtt
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON rtt.topping_id = pt.topping_id
),
exclusion_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        pge.row_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM pizza_get_exclusions pge
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON CAST(pge.exclusions AS INTEGER) = pt.topping_id
),
extra_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        pge.row_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM pizza_get_extras pge
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON CAST(pge.extras AS INTEGER) = pt.topping_id
),
final_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        pco.order_id,
        pco.customer_id,
        pco.pizza_id,
        pge.row_id,
        pn.pizza_name,
        pco.order_time,
        COALESCE(st.topping_name, 'none') AS ingredient,
        CASE 
            WHEN et.topping_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'extra'
            WHEN ex.topping_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'excluded'
            ELSE 'standard'
        END AS source
    FROM pizza_customer_orders pco
    JOIN pizza_names pn ON pco.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_get_extras pge ON pco.order_id = pge.order_id
    JOIN pizza_get_exclusions pgec ON pco.order_id = pgec.order_id AND pge.row_id = pgec.row_id
    LEFT JOIN standard_toppings st ON pco.pizza_id = st.pizza_id
    LEFT JOIN exclusion_toppings ex ON pge.row_id = ex.row_id AND st.topping_name = ex.topping_name
    LEFT JOIN extra_toppings et ON pge.row_id = et.row_id AND st.topping_name = et.topping_name
    WHERE ex.topping_name IS NULL OR ex.topping_name != st.topping_name
),
ingredient_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        ingredient,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM final_ingredients
    GROUP BY row_id, ingredient
),
sorted_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        ingredient,
        cnt,
        CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN '2x' || ingredient ELSE ingredient END AS formatted_ingredient
    FROM ingredient_counts
    ORDER BY row_id, 
             CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             ingredient
),
final_string AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        GROUP_CONCAT(formatted_ingredient, ', ') AS ingredients
    FROM sorted_ingredients
    GROUP BY row_id
)
SELECT 
    fi.row_id,
    pco.order_id,
    pco.customer_id,
    pn.pizza_name || ': ' || fs.ingredients AS result
FROM final_ingredients fi
JOIN pizza_customer_orders pco ON fi.order_id = pco.order_id
JOIN pizza_names pn ON fi.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
JOIN final_string fs ON fi.row_id = fs.row_id
GROUP BY fi.row_id, pco.order_id, pn.pizza_name, pco.order_time
ORDER BY fi.row_id ASC;

WITH recipe_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 1, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 3, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 5, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 5
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 7
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        pr.pizza_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 9, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
    FROM pizza_recipes pr
    WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) >= 9
),
standard_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        rt.pizza_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM recipe_toppings rt
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON rt.topping_id = pt.topping_id
),
excluded_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        pge.row_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM pizza_get_exclusions pge
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON pt.topping_id = CAST(pge.exclusions AS INTEGER)
),
extra_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        pge.row_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM pizza_get_extras pge
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON pt.topping_id = CAST(pge.extras AS INTEGER)
),
final_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        pco.order_id,
        pco.customer_id,
        pco.pizza_id,
        pge.row_id,
        pn.pizza_name,
        pco.order_time,
        CASE 
            WHEN st.topping_name IS NOT NULL THEN st.topping_name
            ELSE NULL
        END AS standard_ingredient,
        CASE 
            WHEN et.topping_name IS NOT NULL THEN et.topping_name
            ELSE NULL
        END AS excluded_ingredient,
        CASE 
            WHEN xt.topping_name IS NOT NULL THEN xt.topping_name
            ELSE NULL
        END AS extra_ingredient
    FROM pizza_customer_orders pco
    JOIN pizza_names pn ON pco.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_get_extras pge ON pco.order_id = pge.order_id
    JOIN pizza_get_exclusions pge2 ON pco.order_id = pge2.order_id
    LEFT JOIN standard_toppings st ON pn.pizza_id = st.pizza_id
    LEFT JOIN excluded_toppings et ON pge.row_id = et.row_id AND st.topping_name = et.topping_name
    LEFT JOIN extra_toppings xt ON pge.row_id = xt.row_id
),
ingredient_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        ingredient_name,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT row_id, standard_ingredient AS ingredient_name FROM final_ingredients WHERE standard_ingredient IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT row_id, extra_ingredient AS ingredient_name FROM final_ingredients WHERE extra_ingredient IS NOT NULL
    )
    WHERE ingredient_name NOT IN (
        SELECT excluded_ingredient FROM final_ingredients fi2 WHERE fi2.row_id = final_ingredients.row_id
    )
    GROUP BY row_id, ingredient_name
),
ingredient_list AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN cnt > 1 THEN '2x' || ingredient_name
                ELSE ingredient_name
            END, ', '
        ) AS ingredients
    FROM (
        SELECT row_id, ingredient_name, cnt
        FROM ingredient_counts
        ORDER BY row_id, 
                 CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
                 ingredient_name
    )
    GROUP BY row_id
)
SELECT 
    fi.row_id,
    fi.order_id,
    fi.customer_id,
    fi.pizza_name,
    fi.pizza_name || ': ' || il.ingredients AS final_ingredients
FROM final_ingredients fi
JOIN ingredient_list il ON fi.row_id = il.row_id
GROUP BY fi.row_id, fi.order_id, fi.pizza_name, fi.order_time
ORDER BY fi.row_id ASC;

WITH base_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        pgo.row_id,
        pgo.order_id,
        pco.customer_id,
        pn.pizza_name,
        pgo.extras,
        pge.exclusions,
        pr.toppings AS standard_toppings
    FROM pizza_customer_orders pco
    JOIN pizza_names pn ON pco.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_get_extras pgo ON pco.order_id = pgo.order_id
    JOIN pizza_get_exclusions pge ON pco.order_id = pge.order_id
    JOIN pizza_recipes pr ON pn.pizza_id = pr.pizza_id
),
parsed_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        standard_toppings,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        -- Parse standard toppings into individual topping IDs
        CAST(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, 1, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',') - 1) AS INTEGER) AS std_topping1,
        CAST(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',') + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',') + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',') + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',') + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS std_topping2,
        CAST(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS std_topping3,
        CAST(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS std_topping4,
        CAST(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 4) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 4) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 4) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 4) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS std_topping5,
        CAST(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 5) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 5) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 5) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(standard_toppings, INSTR(standard_toppings || ',', ',', 1, 5) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS std_topping6
    FROM base_ingredients
),
all_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        std_topping1 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_ingredients WHERE std_topping1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        std_topping2 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_ingredients WHERE std_topping2 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        std_topping3 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_ingredients WHERE std_topping3 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        std_topping4 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_ingredients WHERE std_topping4 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        std_topping5 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_ingredients WHERE std_topping5 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        std_topping6 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_ingredients WHERE std_topping6 IS NOT NULL
),
parsed_extras AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        CAST(SUBSTR(extras, 1, INSTR(extras || ',', ',') - 1) AS INTEGER) AS extra_topping1,
        CAST(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',') + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',') + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',') + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',') + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS extra_topping2,
        CAST(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS extra_topping3,
        CAST(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(extras, INSTR(extras || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS extra_topping4
    FROM all_toppings
),
extra_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        extra_topping1 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_extras WHERE extra_topping1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        extra_topping2 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_extras WHERE extra_topping2 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        extra_topping3 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_extras WHERE extra_topping3 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        extra_topping4 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_extras WHERE extra_topping4 IS NOT NULL
),
parsed_exclusions AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        CAST(SUBSTR(exclusions, 1, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',') - 1) AS INTEGER) AS exclusion_topping1,
        CAST(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',') + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',') + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',') + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',') + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS exclusion_topping2,
        CAST(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS exclusion_topping3,
        CAST(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1, 
                    CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1), ',') > 0 
                         THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1), ',') - 1 
                         ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(exclusions, INSTR(exclusions || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1)) END) AS INTEGER) AS exclusion_topping4
    FROM all_toppings
),
exclusion_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        exclusion_topping1 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_exclusions WHERE exclusion_topping1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        exclusion_topping2 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_exclusions WHERE exclusion_topping2 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        exclusion_topping3 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_exclusions WHERE exclusion_topping3 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        exclusion_topping4 AS topping_id
    FROM parsed_exclusions WHERE exclusion_topping4 IS NOT NULL
),
combined_toppings AS (
    SELECT row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name, topping_id FROM all_toppings
    UNION ALL
    SELECT row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name, topping_id FROM extra_toppings
),
filtered_toppings AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.row_id,
        ct.order_id,
        ct.customer_id,
        ct.pizza_name,
        ct.topping_id,
        pt.topping_name
    FROM combined_toppings ct
    LEFT JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON ct.topping_id = pt.topping_id
    WHERE ct.topping_id NOT IN (SELECT topping_id FROM exclusion_toppings et WHERE et.row_id = ct.row_id)
),
ingredient_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        topping_name,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM filtered_toppings
    GROUP BY row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name, topping_name
),
sorted_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        topping_name,
        cnt,
        CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN '2x' || topping_name ELSE topping_name END AS formatted_topping
    FROM ingredient_counts
),
final_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        GROUP_CONCAT(formatted_topping, ', ') AS ingredients
    FROM (
        SELECT row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name, formatted_topping
        FROM sorted_ingredients
        ORDER BY row_id, formatted_topping
    )
    GROUP BY row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name
)
SELECT 
    fi.row_id,
    fi.order_id,
    fi.customer_id,
    fi.pizza_name,
    fi.pizza_name || ': ' || fi.ingredients AS final_ingredients
FROM final_ingredients fi
ORDER BY fi.row_id ASC;
initial_candidates.exec_error: wrong number of arguments to function INSTR()

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH base_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        pgo.row_id,
        pgo.order_id,
        pco.customer_id,
        pn.pizza_name,
        pgo.extras,
        pge.exclusions,
        CASE 
            WHEN pn.pizza_id = 1 THEN 'Meatlovers'
            ELSE pn.pizza_name
        END AS pizza_name_clean,
        -- Parse toppings from recipe
        TRIM(pizza_recipes.toppings) AS standard_toppings
    FROM pizza_customer_orders pco
    JOIN pizza_names pn ON pco.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_recipes ON pn.pizza_id = pizza_recipes.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_get_extras pgo ON pco.order_id = pgo.order_id
    JOIN pizza_get_exclusions pge ON pco.order_id = pge.order_id
),
ingredient_lists AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name_clean AS pizza_name,
        standard_toppings,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        -- Split standard toppings into individual rows
        CAST(SUBSTR(' ' || standard_toppings || ' ', 
            INSTR(' ' || standard_toppings || ' ', ' ' || CAST(t1.topping_id AS TEXT) || ' '), 
            LENGTH(' ' || standard_toppings || ' ')) AS TEXT) AS std_topping_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(' ' || extras || ' ', 
            INSTR(' ' || extras || ' ', ' ' || CAST(t2.topping_id AS TEXT) || ' '), 
            LENGTH(' ' || extras || ' ')) AS TEXT) AS extra_topping_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(' ' || exclusions || ' ', 
            INSTR(' ' || exclusions || ' ', ' ' || CAST(t3.topping_id AS TEXT) || ' '), 
            LENGTH(' ' || exclusions || ' ')) AS TEXT) AS exclusion_topping_id
    FROM base_ingredients bi
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT 1 AS topping_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
        UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 
        UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 
        UNION ALL SELECT 10
    ) t1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 1 AS topping_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
        UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 
        UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 
        UNION ALL SELECT 10
    ) t2 ON 1=1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 1 AS topping_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
        UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 
        UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 
        UNION ALL SELECT 10
    ) t3 ON 1=1
),
flattened_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        bi.row_id,
        bi.order_id,
        bi.customer_id,
        bi.pizza_name,
        pt.topping_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN pt.topping_id IN (
                SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) 
                FROM (
                    SELECT value FROM json_each('[' || REPLACE(bi.extras, ',', ',') || ']')
                )
            ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS is_extra,
        CASE 
            WHEN pt.topping_id IN (
                SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) 
                FROM (
                    SELECT value FROM json_each('[' || REPLACE(bi.exclusions, ',', ',') || ']')
                )
            ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS is_excluded
    FROM base_ingredients bi
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON INSTR(' ' || bi.standard_toppings || ' ', ' ' || pt.topping_id || ' ') > 0
),
final_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        topping_name,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            row_id,
            order_id,
            customer_id,
            pizza_name,
            topping_name
        FROM flattened_ingredients
        WHERE is_excluded = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 
            row_id,
            order_id,
            customer_id,
            pizza_name,
            pt.topping_name
        FROM base_ingredients bi
        JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON INSTR(' ' || bi.extras || ' ', ' ' || pt.topping_id || ' ') > 0
    )
    GROUP BY row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name, topping_name
),
aggregated_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN cnt > 1 THEN '2x' || topping_name
                ELSE topping_name
            END,
            ', '
        ) AS ingredients_str
    FROM final_ingredients
    GROUP BY row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name
)
SELECT 
    ai.row_id,
    ai.order_id,
    ai.customer_id,
    ai.pizza_name || ': ' || ai.ingredients_str AS result
FROM aggregated_ingredients ai
ORDER BY ai.row_id ASC;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH base_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        pgo.row_id,
        pgo.order_id,
        pco.customer_id,
        pn.pizza_name,
        pgo.extras,
        pge.exclusions,
        CASE 
            WHEN pn.pizza_id = 1 THEN 'Meatlovers'
            ELSE pn.pizza_name
        END AS pizza_name_clean,
        -- Parse toppings from recipe
        TRIM(pizza_recipes.toppings) AS standard_toppings
    FROM pizza_customer_orders pco
    JOIN pizza_names pn ON pco.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_recipes ON pn.pizza_id = pizza_recipes.pizza_id
    JOIN pizza_get_extras pgo ON pco.order_id = pgo.order_id
    JOIN pizza_get_exclusions pge ON pco.order_id = pge.order_id
),
ingredient_lists AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name_clean AS pizza_name,
        standard_toppings,
        extras,
        exclusions,
        -- Split standard toppings into individual rows
        CAST(SUBSTR(' ' || standard_toppings || ' ', 
            INSTR(' ' || standard_toppings || ' ', ' ' || CAST(t1.topping_id AS TEXT) || ' '), 
            LENGTH(' ' || standard_toppings || ' ')) AS TEXT) AS std_topping_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(' ' || extras || ' ', 
            INSTR(' ' || extras || ' ', ' ' || CAST(t2.topping_id AS TEXT) || ' '), 
            LENGTH(' ' || extras || ' ')) AS TEXT) AS extra_topping_id,
        CAST(SUBSTR(' ' || exclusions || ' ', 
            INSTR(' ' || exclusions || ' ', ' ' || CAST(t3.topping_id AS TEXT) || ' '), 
            LENGTH(' ' || exclusions || ' ')) AS TEXT) AS exclusion_topping_id
    FROM base_ingredients bi
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT 1 AS topping_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
        UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 
        UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 
        UNION ALL SELECT 10
    ) t1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 1 AS topping_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
        UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 
        UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 
        UNION ALL SELECT 10
    ) t2 ON 1=1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 1 AS topping_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
        UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 
        UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 
        UNION ALL SELECT 10
    ) t3 ON 1=1
),
flattened_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        bi.row_id,
        bi.order_id,
        bi.customer_id,
        bi.pizza_name,
        pt.topping_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN pt.topping_id IN (
                SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) 
                FROM (
                    SELECT value FROM json_each('[' || REPLACE(bi.extras, ',', ',') || ']')
                )
            ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS is_extra,
        CASE 
            WHEN pt.topping_id IN (
                SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) 
                FROM (
                    SELECT value FROM json_each('[' || REPLACE(bi.exclusions, ',', ',') || ']')
                )
            ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS is_excluded
    FROM base_ingredients bi
    JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON INSTR(' ' || bi.standard_toppings || ' ', ' ' || pt.topping_id || ' ') > 0
),
final_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        topping_name,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            row_id,
            order_id,
            customer_id,
            pizza_name,
            topping_name
        FROM flattened_ingredients
        WHERE is_excluded = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 
            row_id,
            order_id,
            customer_id,
            pizza_name,
            pt.topping_name
        FROM base_ingredients bi
        JOIN pizza_toppings pt ON INSTR(' ' || bi.extras || ' ', ' ' || pt.topping_id || ' ') > 0
    )
    GROUP BY row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name, topping_name
),
aggregated_ingredients AS (
    SELECT 
        row_id,
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        pizza_name,
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN cnt > 1 THEN '2x' || topping_name
                ELSE topping_name
            END,
            ', '
        ) AS ingredients_str
    FROM final_ingredients
    GROUP BY row_id, order_id, customer_id, pizza_name
)
SELECT 
    ai.row_id,
    ai.order_id,
    ai.customer_id,
    ai.pizza_name || ': ' || ai.ingredients_str AS result
FROM aggregated_ingredients ai
ORDER BY ai.row_id ASC;
